description_long: This shotgun features a robust, futuristic design with a predominantly metallic blue and silver finish, accented by subtle black and gray details. The body is angular and reinforced, with a large, rectangular barrel shroud and a visible muzzle at the front. The receiver area is detailed with mechanical components, including a visible ejection port and several small, circular indents that may serve as vents or fasteners. The grip is compact and integrated into the rear section, with a short, angular extension that likely serves as a stock or brace. The top of the shotgun includes a raised section, possibly for mounting optics or sights, and the overall construction suggests a heavy-duty, tactical application. The surface is mostly matte with some sleek, smooth panels, and the object appears solid and durable, suitable for urban combat scenarios.
description: A heavy, futuristic shotgun with a metallic blue and silver finish, angular body, and reinforced barrel shroud. Features a compact grip, visible mechanical details, and a robust, tactical appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the metallic blue and silver panels, barrel shroud, and compact grip.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the muzzle opening, angular barrel shroud, and the symmetrical, reinforced structure of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with visible mechanical details and the same blue and silver color scheme.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the compact grip, angular rear section, and the top-mounted raised section, with the barrel shroud tapering away.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, rectangular shroud with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rectangular trigger guard with a reinforced, angular profile
